mapper.select: SELECT id, school_name, school_alias, tier_code, tier_score FROM school_tier_dictionary WHERE school_name = #{schoolName} OR school_alias = #{schoolName} OR #{schoolName} LIKE CONCAT('%', school_name, '%') OR (school_alias IS NOT NULL AND #{schoolName} LIKE CONCAT('%', school_alias, '%')) ORDER BY tier_score DESC, CHAR_LENGTH(school_name) DESC LIMIT 1
